# Crossout

> Crossout is a landing-page affiliate site focused on Unbounce reviews, pricing, comparisons, conversion-rate optimization, and daily blog content for marketers and agencies.

This site is built to help visitors find the best Unbounce content quickly. The most important pages are listed below.

## Core pages

- [Home](https://brightlane.github.io/crossout/)
- [Unbounce Review](https://brightlane.github.io/crossout/unbounce-review/)
- [Unbounce Pricing](https://brightlane.github.io/crossout/unbounce-pricing/)
- [Unbounce Features](https://brightlane.github.io/crossout/unbounce-features/)
- [Unbounce vs Leadpages](https://brightlane.github.io/crossout/unbounce-vs-leadpages/)
- [Unbounce vs ClickFunnels](https://brightlane.github.io/crossout/unbounce-vs-clickfunnels/)
- [Best Landing Page Builder](https://brightlane.github.io/crossout/best-landing-page-builder/)
- [Landing Page CRO Guide](https://brightlane.github.io/crossout/landing-page-cro/)
- [Agency Playbook](https://brightlane.github.io/crossout/agency-playbook/)
- [Start Here](https://brightlane.github.io/crossout/start-here/)

## Blog

- [Blog Index](https://brightlane.github.io/crossout/blog/)

## Notes

- Primary topic: Unbounce landing pages and conversion optimization.
- Primary conversion goal: affiliate trial clicks and signups.
- The site also generates daily blog posts and keeps the sitemap current.
